prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it pertains to the provisions and standards surrounding the production of official statistics which are a shared governance approach across the UK. Scottish statistical agencies also adhere to the principle of impartiality and independence from political influence.
